name: Fuse Cobalt Inc.
description: Fuse Cobalt Inc. is a Canadian mineral exploration company focused on the acquisition, exploration, and development of energy metals projects. The company's primary focus is on its cobalt properties located in Ontario, Canada, including the Glencore Bucke Property and the Teledyne Cobalt Property, which are strategically situated near established mining infrastructure. Fuse Cobalt aims to identify and secure high-grade cobalt deposits to support the growing global demand for battery metals used in electric vehicles and green energy storage technologies.
